expectations.text: Review identifies path traversal vulnerability from unsanitized filename parameter
expectations.evidence: '### 1. Path Traversal Vulnerability (Security - Critical)' — ../../etc/passwd example, filepath.Base / HasPrefix fix

expectations.text: Review flags that errors from exec, Glob, Stat, or Remove are silently ignored
expectations.evidence: '### 5. Silently Ignored Errors Throughout' — covers Glob, os.Stat (nil pointer panic), and os.Remove all in one finding

expectations.text: Review catches either the missing bytes import (compile error) or deprecated ioutil.ReadFile
expectations.evidence: '### 3. Missing Import: bytes Package' and '### 6. ioutil.ReadFile Is Deprecated' — both caught

expectations.text: Path traversal and/or command injection findings are marked as error or critical severity
expectations.evidence: Path traversal and command injection both labeled 'Security - Critical' in section headers
